grant_title: Request for Proposals for 2026 Affordable Housing Trust Fund (New Jersey)
project_area: Affordable housing development (rental and homeownership units, 25 units or fewer)
demographic_requirements: Targeted to households below 80% of Area Median Income
eligibility_summary: Municipalities with court-approved affordable housing settlements or developers supported by such municipalities are eligible. Projects must leverage other state/local investments or partnerships. Ineligible costs include public housing operations, tenant-based rental assistance, and delinquent taxes/fines.
